name: classroom-codenames
description: Installable local-network host app for Classroom CodeNames.
author: Classroom CodeNames

scripts.dev: npm run native:node && concurrently -n client,server -c blue,red "npm run dev --workspace client" "npm run dev --workspace server"
scripts.dev:server: npm run native:node && npm run dev --workspace server
scripts.build:prod: npm run build:shared && npm run build:client && npm run build:server:prod
scripts.prepare:desktop: npm run build:prod && npm run generate:icons && npm run native:electron
scripts.package:all: npm run prepare:desktop && electron-builder --mac pkg --win nsis
scripts.preview:lan: npm run native:node && npm run build && node scripts/lanPreview.mjs
scripts.validate:lan: npm run native:node && npm run build && node scripts/validateLanPreview.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace client && npm run build --workspace server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace client && npm run typecheck --workspace server
scripts.reset:room: npm run native:node && npm run reset:room --workspace server --
